title: Google Antigravity 2.0 Beginner's Guide
summary: Google Antigravity 2.0 is a desktop application designed for multi-agent team collaboration with scheduled tasks, native voice capabilities, and integration with Google products. It positions itself as an agent-optimized experience for users.
